summary: drbi.org fully migrated to Cloudflare Workers + D1 + R2 + Astro 7. Whitelist auth (Google One Tap + email magic-link + break-glass). Secrets in CF store (nothing baked). PostHog harvested+removed, CF Web Analytics wired. Admin fully functional incl. content editors. BDD suite 76/76 passing against production; pre-deploy gate in place.
